CustomField.formula: IF( AND(Flosum__Job_Completed__c , Flosum__Succeed__c ) , IMAGE('/resource/'+$Setup.Flosum__Credentials__c.Flosum__Namespace__c+'IconsUtility/Passed.png', 'No issues', 30, 127) , IF( NOT(Flosum__Job_Completed__c), IMAGE('/resource/'+$Setup.Flosum__Credentials__c.Flosum__Namespace__c+'IconsUtility/Progress.png', 'In progress', 30, 127), IMAGE('/resource/'+$Setup.Flosum__Credentials__c.Flosum__Namespace__c+'IconsUtility/Failed.png', 'Issues found', 30, 127)))
CustomField.label: Result
